subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever been and wilt ever remain firmly attached to the cord of the Dayspring of God's Cause and the Dawning-Place of His celestial revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بحبل مطلع امر الهی و مشرق وحی صمدانی متمسک باشی دنیا و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant
